title: oxyceros pauciflorus
intro: Oxyceros pauciflorus, also known as the few-flowered Oxyceros or few-flowered Randia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Oxyceros pauciflorus has been traditionally used to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues, providing various health benefits. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
